title: koeleria truncata
intro: Koeleria truncata, also known as the June grass or pygmy hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria truncata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Koeleria truncata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
